modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access KnowBe4 training after missing the deadline.

full_description_text: 
The user was trying to complete their KnowBe4 Cyber Security Training but found that the course is no longer available. They mentioned missing the deadline and are unsure if they can still access the training materials. Additionally, they are looking for confirmation on whether they have completed the required training or not. This situation raises questions about the accessibility of the training post-deadline and the tracking of completion status.
